ALL_SLIDES.title: Bluecrow Startt
ALL_SLIDES.description: Opening slide that sets the tone for the presentation and introduces BlueCrow Capital as an investment management firm.

pitchScript.en-US: Thank you for joining us today. I’d like to introduce you to BlueCrow Capital—who we are, how we invest, and the opportunities we create for our clients.
pitchScript.en-UK: Thank you for joining us today. I’d like to introduce you to BlueCrow Capital—who we are, how we invest, and the opportunities we create for our clients.
pitchScript.pt-BR: Obrigado por se juntar a nós hoje. Gostaria de lhe apresentar a BlueCrow Capital — quem somos, como investimos e as oportunidades que criamos para os nossos clientes.

ALL_SLIDES.title: About Bluecrow Overview
ALL_SLIDES.description: Provides a high-level overview of BlueCrow Capital, including its history, positioning in the market, and assets under management.

pitchScript.en-US: BlueCrow is a licensed financial company focused on managing venture capital funds and alternative investment funds. We began our activity in 2010, with a clear objective from the very beginning. Our goal has always been to offer private investors access to investment opportunities that are not available to most traditional investors. That’s why we mainly work with individuals and family-owned businesses, giving them the opportunity to invest in alternative assets. Today, in Portugal, we manage well-over 650 million euros in assets. We currently oversee close to 21 investment funds. Our focus is always on disciplined fund management and on maintaining a close, long lasting relationship with our investors.
pitchScript.en-UK: BlueCrow is a licensed financial company focused on managing venture capital funds and alternative investment funds. We began our activity in 2010, with a clear objective from the very beginning. Our goal has always been to offer private investors access to investment opportunities that are not available to most traditional investors. That’s why we mainly work with individuals and family-owned businesses, giving them the opportunity to invest in alternative assets. Today, in Portugal, we manage well-over 650 million euros in assets. We currently oversee close to 21 investment funds. Our focus is always on disciplined fund management and on maintaining a close, long lasting relationship with our investors.
pitchScript.pt-BR: A BlueCrow é uma empresa financeira licenciada, especializada na gestão de fundos de capital de risco e fundos de investimento alternativos. Iniciámos a nossa atividade em 2010, com um objetivo claro desde o início. O nosso propósito sempre foi oferecer aos investidores privados acesso a oportunidades de investimento que não estão disponíveis para a maioria dos investidores tradicionais, razão pela qual trabalhamos principalmente com particulares e empresas familiares, proporcionando-lhes a possibilidade de investir em ativos alternativos. Atualmente, em Portugal, gerimos mais de 650 milhões de euros em ativos e supervisionamos cerca de 21 fundos de investimento, alguns dos quais partilham a mesma estratégia de investimento, diferenciando-se apenas pelo ano de lançamento. Como referido anteriormente, o nosso foco está sempre na gestão disciplinada dos fundos e na manutenção de uma relação próxima e de longo prazo com os investidores individuais, sejam famílias ou particulares.

pitchScript.en-US: Let me now introduce Next Tech Fund. This is one of BlueCrow’s flagship venture capital funds, designed to give investors exposure to high-growth technology companies. The fund focuses on innovative projects that are shaping the future of their industries, while benefiting from Portugal’s rapidly expanding startup ecosystem. Next Tech Fund was created to combine diversification with strong return potential over the long term.
pitchScript.en-UK: Let me now introduce Next Tech Fund. This is one of BlueCrow’s flagship venture capital funds, designed to give investors exposure to high-growth technology companies. The fund focuses on innovative projects that are shaping the future of their industries, while benefiting from Portugal’s rapidly expanding startup ecosystem. Next Tech Fund was created to combine diversification with strong return potential over the long term.
pitchScript.pt-BR: Permita-me agora apresentar o Next Tech Fund. Este é um dos principais fundos de capital de risco da BlueCrow, criado para dar aos investidores exposição a empresas tecnológicas com elevado potencial de crescimento. O fundo foca-se em projetos inovadores que beneficiam do ecossistema de startups em rápida expansão em Portugal e de tendências tecnológicas de longo prazo.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Next Tech Fund Manager
ALL_SLIDES.description: Introduces Antonio Mello Campello the fund manager of Next Tech Fund I and Managing Partner, and highlights their professional background and investment philosophy.

pitchScript.en-US: The Next tech funds are managed by António Mello Campello, Managing Partner at BlueCrow Capital. António has over twenty-five years of experience in capital markets and investment management, including roles in investment banking and asset management. His approach is centred on disciplined portfolio construction, long-term thinking, and a strong focus on risk control, which is fundamental in managing investment strategies.
pitchScript.en-UK: The Next tech funds are managed by António Mello Campello, Managing Partner at BlueCrow Capital. António has over twenty-five years of experience in capital markets and investment management, including roles in investment banking and asset management. His approach is centred on disciplined portfolio construction, long-term thinking, and a strong focus on risk control, which is fundamental in managing investment strategies.
pitchScript.pt-BR: O Next Tech Fund é gerido por Francisco Sousa Louro, um profissional de investimento com mais de dezasseis anos de experiência nos mercados de capitais e na gestão de ativos. O seu percurso inclui ações, construção de portefólios e avaliação de investimentos em private equity. A sua filosofia assenta numa abordagem de longo prazo, baseada no conhecimento profundo das empresas, e não em previsões de mercado de curto prazo.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Next Tech Portugal Tech Ecosystem 1
ALL_SLIDES.description: Explains why Portugal has become an attractive environment for technology companies and innovation-driven investments.

pitchScript.en-US: Portugal has emerged as a highly attractive destination for technology and innovation. The country combines political and economic stability with a strong focus on innovation, talent development, and entrepreneurship. Its quality of life, competitive cost structure, and access to European and global markets have helped attract both startups and international investors. These conditions create a fertile environment for building and scaling technology-driven companies.
pitchScript.en-UK: Portugal has emerged as a highly attractive destination for technology and innovation. The country combines political and economic stability with a strong focus on innovation, talent development, and entrepreneurship. Its quality of life, competitive cost structure, and access to European and global markets have helped attract both startups and international investors. These conditions create a fertile environment for building and scaling technology-driven companies.
pitchScript.pt-BR: Portugal tornou-se um destino cada vez mais atrativo para a tecnologia e a inovação. Combina estabilidade política e económica com uma forte aposta no empreendedorismo, no talento e na inovação. Estas condições criam um ambiente propício para que empresas tecnológicas cresçam, se expandam e compitam a nível internacional.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Next Tech Portugal Tech Ecosystem 2
ALL_SLIDES.description: Builds on the Portuguese tech ecosystem by highlighting talent, education, and innovation as key growth drivers.

pitchScript.en-US: One of Portugal’s greatest strengths is its talent base. The country produces highly qualified professionals in engineering, technology, and science, supported by strong universities and research centres. This talent, combined with a culture of innovation and increasing access to international markets, has positioned Portugal as a competitive hub for technology companies. For investors, this means access to businesses built on solid foundations with strong long-term growth potential.
pitchScript.en-UK: One of Portugal’s greatest strengths is its talent base. The country produces highly qualified professionals in engineering, technology, and science, supported by strong universities and research centres. This talent, combined with a culture of innovation and increasing access to international markets, has positioned Portugal as a competitive hub for technology companies. For investors, this means access to businesses built on solid foundations with strong long-term growth potential.
pitchScript.pt-BR: Uma das grandes vantagens de Portugal é a sua base de talento. O país forma profissionais altamente qualificados em engenharia, tecnologia e ciências, apoiados por universidades e centros de investigação de referência. Este talento, aliado a uma cultura de inovação, reforça o potencial de crescimento das empresas tecnológicas.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Next Tech Startup Economic Impact
ALL_SLIDES.description: Explains the economic relevance and scale of Portugal’s startup ecosystem, including revenue generation, job creation, and export orientation.

pitchScript.en-US: Portugal’s startup ecosystem already has a very real and measurable economic impact. In 2024 alone, startups generated around two point six billion euros in revenue, with more than half of that coming from exports. This shows that these companies are not only innovative, but also globally competitive. The sector has created over twenty-six thousand jobs, making it a meaningful contributor to the national economy. Technology plays a central role here, driving growth, employment, and internationalisation.
pitchScript.en-UK: Portugal’s startup ecosystem already has a very real and measurable economic impact. In 2024 alone, startups generated around two point six billion euros in revenue, with more than half of that coming from exports. This shows that these companies are not only innovative, but also globally competitive. The sector has created over twenty-six thousand jobs, making it a meaningful contributor to the national economy. Technology plays a central role here, driving growth, employment, and internationalisation.
pitchScript.pt-BR: As startups em Portugal já têm um impacto económico muito significativo. Em 2024, geraram cerca de dois vírgula seis mil milhões de euros em receitas, com uma forte componente de exportação. Criaram também dezenas de milhares de postos de trabalho qualificados, tornando a tecnologia um motor relevante do crescimento económico.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Next Tech International Investor Confidence
ALL_SLIDES.description: Shows how international investors are already investing heavily in Portuguese startups, validating the attractiveness of the ecosystem.

pitchScript.en-US: This opportunity has not gone unnoticed internationally. A significant share of the capital invested in Portuguese startups already comes from foreign investors. This international participation is a strong validation of the quality of the companies being built here and the maturity of the ecosystem. For investors, this means entering a market that has already been recognised and endorsed by global capital, rather than an untested or purely local opportunity.
pitchScript.en-UK: This opportunity has not gone unnoticed internationally. A significant share of the capital invested in Portuguese startups already comes from foreign investors. For investors, this means entering a market that has already been recognised and endorsed by global capital, rather than an untested or purely local opportunity.
pitchScript.pt-BR: Esta oportunidade já foi reconhecida a nível internacional. Uma parte significativa do capital investido em startups portuguesas provém de investidores estrangeiros, o que valida a qualidade, maturidade e relevância global deste ecossistema.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Next Tech Startup Risk Resilience
ALL_SLIDES.description: Addresses investment risk by explaining failure risk levels and financial resilience of Portuguese startups.

pitchScript.en-US: While startups are often associated with high risk, the reality in Portugal is more balanced. Data shows that nearly three quarters of startups fall into the minimum or reduced failure risk categories. In addition, their financial resilience is broadly in line with the overall business community. This creates a more attractive risk-return profile, especially when investments are diversified across multiple companies within a professionally managed fund structure.
pitchScript.en-UK: While startups are often associated with high risk, the reality in Portugal is more balanced. Data shows that nearly three quarters of startups fall into the minimum or reduced failure risk categories. In addition, their financial resilience is broadly in line with the overall business community. This creates a more attractive risk-return profile, especially when investments are diversified across multiple companies within a professionally managed fund structure.
pitchScript.pt-BR: Embora as startups sejam frequentemente associadas a risco elevado, os dados mostram uma realidade mais equilibrada. A maioria das startups portuguesas apresenta risco mínimo ou reduzido e níveis de resiliência financeira semelhantes aos do tecido empresarial em geral.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Next Tech Fund Vision
ALL_SLIDES.description: Presents the vision, objectives, size, and long-term horizon of Next Tech Fund I.

pitchScript.en-US: Our Next Tech Fund launched in 2020, and it has been a real success story. We raised around €35 million and deployed that capital quickly, investing in 10 promising companies. Their performance has been so strong that we decided to reopen the fund. We are now raising additional capital from investors in Portugal and internationally to support both our existing portfolio companies and new opportunities. Like most of our funds, this one will be listed on Euronext Access, which provides flexibility. If your Golden Visa plans change or you need liquidity before the fund matures, you will have the option of an early exit.

Their performance has been so strong that we decided to reopen the fund. Like most of our funds, this one will be listed on Euronext Access, which provides flexibility. pitchScript.pt-BR: O nosso Next Tech Fund foi lançado em 2020 e tem sido um verdadeiro caso de sucesso. Angariámos cerca de 35 milhões de euros e alocámos esse capital de forma rápida, investindo em 10 empresas promissoras. O desempenho tem sido tão forte que decidimos reabrir o fundo. Estamos agora a angariar capital adicional junto de investidores em Portugal e a nível internacional para apoiar tanto as empresas já presentes no portefólio como novas oportunidades. Tal como a maioria dos nossos fundos, este será cotado na Euronext Access, o que proporciona flexibilidade. Caso os seus planos de Golden Visa mudem ou necessite de liquidez antes do término do fundo, terá a possibilidade de uma saída antecipada.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Next Tech Investment Policy Target Sectors
ALL_SLIDES.description: Explains the fund’s investment policy, sector focus, and criteria for selecting portfolio companies.

pitchScript.en-US: So what's the fund really about? Here's the thing real value doesn't come from just having great technology. You could have the most brilliant physicist or technologist creating an incredible product, but if they can't sell it or actually solve customer problems, it's not going to generate much value. That's where we come in. We're incredibly hands-on with our companies, working closely to help them grow their customer base and deliver real results. We call it our 'local champion' strategy, we back companies that are truly excellent at getting their products to market, both here in Portugal and abroad. Our goal with this fund? Take it from 10 tech companies to 20, making sure each one is making a genuine impact and building lasting value.

pitchScript.pt-BR: Então, do que trata realmente o fundo? A questão é esta, o verdadeiro valor não vem apenas de ter ótima tecnologia. Pode ter o físico ou tecnólogo mais brilhante a criar um produto incrível, mas se não conseguirem vendê-lo ou resolver realmente os problemas dos clientes, não vai gerar muito valor. É aí que entramos. Somos extremamente práticos com as nossas empresas, trabalhando de perto para as ajudar a aumentar a sua base de clientes e entregar resultados reais. Chamamos-lhe a nossa estratégia de 'campeão local', apoiamos empresas que são verdadeiramente excelentes a colocar os seus produtos no mercado, tanto aqui em Portugal como no estrangeiro. O nosso objetivo com este fundo? Levá-lo de 10 empresas tecnológicas para 20, garantindo que cada uma está a ter um impacto genuíno e a construir valor duradouro.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Next Tech Hands On Local Champion
ALL_SLIDES.description: Describes the fund’s hands-on approach and its strategy of building local market leaders with international expansion potential.

pitchScript.en-US: For us, venture capital is divided into three stages: technology development, proof of concept, and commercial and geographical expansion. We do not invest at the technology development stage, and while we may be close to the proof-of-concept phase, our core focus is on commercial execution and international expansion. This is, in our view, the only sustainable way to achieve higher valuations. If we are not able to add value by helping companies grow internationally, then we are not able to create value for you as an investor.
pitchScript.en-UK: For us, venture capital is divided into three stages: technology development, proof of concept, and commercial and geographical expansion. We do not invest at the technology development stage, and while we may be close to the proof-of-concept phase, our core focus is on commercial execution and international expansion. This is, in our view, the only sustainable way to achieve higher valuations. If we are not able to add value by helping companies grow internationally, then we are not able to create value for you as an investor.
pitchScript.pt-BR: Para nós, o venture capital está dividido em três fases: desenvolvimento tecnológico, prova de conceito e expansão comercial e geográfica. Não investimos na fase de desenvolvimento tecnológico e, embora possamos estar próximos da fase de prova de conceito, o nosso foco principal está na execução comercial e na expansão internacional. Entendemos que esta é a única forma sustentável de alcançar valorizações mais elevadas. Se não formos capazes de acrescentar valor ajudando as empresas a crescer internacionalmente, então também não seremos capazes de criar valor para si enquanto investidor.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Next Tech Exit Strategy Retruns
ALL_SLIDES.description: Explains how Next Tech Fund I plans to generate returns through exits such as acquisitions, mergers, IPOs, or secondary market sales.

pitchScript.en-US: Our first priority is to help these companies expand into new markets, moving from Portugal to Spain, then to France, Germany, the UK, and the Nordics, in order to find new clients who, like us, recognize the strength of the business and the quality of the product. Once the company is established in five or six European markets and its position is consolidated, the next step is to expand into the United States. We focus on the US because it hosts the largest, most liquid, and most valuable capital market in the world. In short, our strategy is to create value in Europe and ultimately materialize that value in the US.
pitchScript.en-UK: Our first priority is to help these companies expand into new markets, moving from Portugal to Spain, then to France, Germany, the UK, and the Nordics, in order to find new clients who, like us, recognize the strength of the business and the quality of the product. Once the company is established in five or six European markets and its position is consolidated, the next step is to expand into the United States. We focus on the US because it hosts the largest, most liquid, and most valuable capital market in the world. In short, our strategy is to create value in Europe and ultimately materialize that value in the US.
pitchScript.pt-BR: A nossa primeira prioridade é ajudar estas empresas a expandirem-se para novos mercados, começando por Portugal, depois Espanha, seguindo-se França, Alemanha, Reino Unido e os países nórdicos, de forma a encontrar novos clientes que, tal como nós, reconheçam a solidez do negócio e a qualidade do produto. Depois de a empresa estar estabelecida em cinco ou seis mercados europeus e com a sua posição consolidada, o passo seguinte é a expansão para os Estados Unidos. Focamo-nos nos EUA porque é o maior, mais líquido e mais valioso mercado de capitais do mundo.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Next Tech What Hapens To My Money
ALL_SLIDES.description: Explains how investor capital is allocated, diversified, and managed throughout the life of the fund.

pitchScript.en-US: Here's how investing in the fund actually works. Think of it like building a traditional portfolio of companies, but we're really strategic about timing. We spread our investments over five years, putting money in at the right moments. Typically, we start with the initial capital in years one and two, then continue adding more throughout the remaining time. Why this approach? It lets us stay close to each business, watching how they grow and stepping in with guidance when they need it. The companies we partner with are completely open with us, there's genuine trust and transparency both ways. And here's something we're really proud of: we've managed to do what most Portuguese VC firms struggle with. We regularly bring international investors to the table, getting them involved in our companies' cap tables. It's a game-changer because it validates these businesses globally and spreads the risk significantly. When international players see the same potential we do, everyone benefits.

pitchScript.pt-BR: Aqui está como funciona realmente investir no fundo. Pense nisso como construir um portfólio tradicional de empresas, mas somos muito estratégicos quanto ao timing. Distribuímos os nossos investimentos ao longo de cinco anos, colocando dinheiro nos momentos certos. Normalmente, começamos com o capital inicial nos anos um e dois, depois continuamos a adicionar mais durante o tempo restante. Porquê esta abordagem? Permite-nos ficar perto de cada negócio, observando como crescem e intervindo com orientação quando precisam. As empresas com quem fazemos parceria são completamente abertas connosco, há confiança genuína e transparência nos dois sentidos. E aqui está algo de que temos muito orgulho: conseguimos fazer o que a maioria das empresas portuguesas de capital de risco têm dificuldade. Trazemos regularmente investidores internacionais para a mesa, envolvendo-os nas cap tables das nossas empresas. É transformador porque valida estes negócios globalmente e distribui o risco significativamente. Quando players internacionais veem o mesmo potencial que nós, todos beneficiam.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Next Tech Investment Cashflow Performance
ALL_SLIDES.description: Describes the investment cashflow profile, expected returns, and internal rate of return of the fund.

pitchScript.en-US: So, we're not distributing dividends right now. Instead, we're focused on something better, letting your investment grow through compound capitalization. What does that mean for you? Well, while the fund has a longer timeline overall, we're targeting returns of around 2x your initial investment. Your money stays in the fund, working and growing, rather than being paid out along the way.
pitchScript.en-UK: So, we're not distributing dividends right now. Instead, we're focused on something better, letting your investment grow through compound capitalization. What does that mean for you? Well, while the fund has a longer timeline overall, we're targeting returns of around 2x your initial investment. Your money stays in the fund, working and growing, rather than being paid out along the way.
pitchScript.pt-BR: Então, não estamos a distribuir dividendos neste momento. Em vez disso, focamo-nos em algo melhor, deixar o seu investimento crescer através da capitalização composta. O que significa isso para si? Bem, embora o fundo tenha um cronograma mais longo no geral, estamos a visar retornos de cerca de duas vezes o seu investimento inicial. O seu dinheiro fica no fundo, a trabalhar e a crescer, em vez de ser pago ao longo do caminho.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Next Tech Portfolio Overview
ALL_SLIDES.description: Provides an overview of the Next tech fund’s portfolio structure, diversification, and investment stages.

pitchScript.en-US: Let me walk you through our portfolio companies, this is where it gets really exciting. They're all tech, but the variety is incredible. Take Kit-ar, for example. They build AR software for goggles, and they're already working with Bentley in the UK in their manufacturing plants. Plus, they've got pilot projects with Porsche, Peugeot, and even Boeing. It's amazing watching them transform how these industries work. Then we've got fintech plays like Paynest and Identify. Identify's doing something really interesting, they're powering banking and healthcare communications in Portugal and Spain. They handle a massive chunk of calls for major banks, including Portugal's state-owned bank. And in the US, they're working with top healthcare institutions. The traction they're seeing validates everything we believed about them. Sensei is one I'm particularly excited about. They've built what might be the most advanced smart retail system out there. Walk into a store, grab what you need, walk out, completely frictionless. Store owners get real-time insights on everything, and brands can engage directly with shoppers through the platform. We've been with them from day one, and it's been incredible to watch. Now, Tonic App is what people jokingly call 'Doctor Google', but it's exclusively for actual doctors. Only verified medical professionals can use it, which makes the network incredibly valuable. We're talking about 75% of doctors in Portugal, similar reach in Spain and Italy, and we're pushing into France, Germany, and the UK. Every interaction generates data that's gold for pharma companies, positioning Tonic right at the center of healthcare innovation. We're also big on IoT and automation. Companies like Ubetter, IVV, and Bandola Qbetter are tackling everything from queue management to home automation to agricultural robots. IVV's building autonomous tractors that are being tested in some pretty harsh conditions in northern Spain, they need to work anywhere, in any weather. And Pandora's smart energy solutions are already deployed in Portugal, Brazil, and the US. What you're seeing here is serious diversification. But honestly? What gets me most excited isn't just the technology or the growth potential, it's the real-world impact. These companies are transforming retail, revolutionizing healthcare, advancing automation, pushing sustainable energy. That's our whole approach at BlueCrow: find companies with breakthrough tech and strong teams, then roll up our sleeves and help them scale globally. We're creating value for everyone, investors, customers, the broader market. And the best part? We're just getting started.

Gerem uma enorme parte das chamadas para grandes bancos, incluindo o banco estatal português. E nos EUA, trabalham com instituições de saúde de topo. A tração que estão a ver valida tudo o que acreditávamos sobre eles. A Sensei é uma que me entusiasma particularmente. Construíram o que pode ser o sistema de retalho inteligente mais avançado lá fora. Entre numa loja, pegue no que precisa, saia, completamente sem atritos. Os proprietários das lojas obtêm insights em tempo real sobre tudo, e as marcas podem envolver-se diretamente com os compradores através da plataforma. Estamos com eles desde o primeiro dia, e tem sido incrível assistir. Agora, a Tonic App é o que as pessoas chamam brincando de 'Google dos Médicos', mas é exclusivamente para médicos reais. Apenas profissionais médicos verificados podem usá-la, o que torna a rede incrivelmente valiosa. Estamos a falar de 75% dos médicos em Portugal, alcance semelhante em Espanha e Itália, e estamos a empurrar para França, Alemanha e Reino Unido. Cada interação gera dados que são ouro para empresas farmacêuticas, posicionando a Tonic mesmo no centro da inovação em saúde. Também apostamos forte em IoT e automação. Empresas como Ubetter, IVV e Bandola Qbetter estão a abordar tudo, desde gestão de filas até automação doméstica e robots agrícolas. A IVV está a construir tratores autónomos que estão a ser testados em condições bastante duras no norte de Espanha, precisam funcionar em qualquer lugar, em qualquer clima. E as soluções de energia inteligente da Pandora já estão implementadas em Portugal, Brasil e EUA. O que está a ver aqui é diversificação séria. Mas honestamente? O que mais me entusiasma não é apenas a tecnologia ou o potencial de crescimento, é o impacto no mundo real. Estas empresas estão a transformar o retalho, revolucionar a saúde, avançar a automação, impulsionar energia sustentável. Essa é toda a nossa abordagem na BlueCrow: encontrar empresas com tecnologia inovadora e equipas fortes, depois arregaçar as mangas e ajudá-las a escalar globalmente. Estamos a criar valor para todos, investidores, clientes, o mercado em geral. E a melhor parte? Estamos apenas a começar.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Next Tech Fund Summary Fees
ALL_SLIDES.description: Summarises the key characteristics of Next Tech Fund I, including minimum investment, Golden Visa eligibility, fund duration, and fee structure.

pitchScript.en-US: Now, let me walk you through the investment terms of the fund in a simple and friendly way. The minimum investment is €50,000. From that amount, we apply a one-time setup fee of 3%, which we deduct when you join the fund. After that, there’s a management fee of 2% per year. This covers the day-to-day work of managing the portfolio, supporting companies, and generating value. We also have a performance fee of 20%, but with a very important mechanism called the hurdle rate, set at 5%. What does that mean in practice? Imagine we deliver you a 10% return in a given year. The first 5% belongs entirely to you, we don’t take any performance fee on that part. Only the additional 5% above the hurdle is subject to the 20% performance fee. So we only win when you win, and only on the portion that exceeds the 5% benchmark. In terms of oversight and security, the fund is fully regulated by CMVM, which is the Portuguese financial regulatory authority. Our auditor is Mazars, a highly reputable international audit firm, and our depositary bank, the institution that safeguards the fund’s assets, is Millennium BCP. So overall, everything is built to be transparent, well-regulated, and aligned with your success as an investor.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Agrobusiness Growth Fund 1
ALL_SLIDES.description: Highlights BlueCrow Capital’s historical experience by showing the Growth fund track record in private equity, asset management, and Golden Visa–eligible funds.

pitchScript.en-US: This really began in a significant way in 2018 with the launch of the BlueCrow Growth Fund, which marked our first major step into the private equity sector. We initially raised capital from a group of private investors to kick-start the fund’s activity, and from 2019 onwards we saw a strong increase in demand from investors seeking Golden Visa opportunities. Its focus is on private equity, and it has been listed on the stock exchange since July of this year. It is a fund with substantial scale, operating fully in line with its defined objectives, currently managing more than 50 assets and delivering consistent performance, which allows us to pay a steady annual dividend of 5% to our investors.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Agrobusiness Investment Policy Target Sectors
ALL_SLIDES.description: Demonstrates BlueCrow’s experience in developing and managing agricultural and agrobusiness assets.

pitchScript.en-US: It was through this ability to understand venture capital funds that we developed our activity in the agribusiness sector, which became one of the initial core focuses of the Growth Fund. Within this fund, we built deep knowledge that allowed us to identify four new investment areas in Agrobusiness that, in our view, offer significant value creation opportunities. As a result, the AgroBusiness fund is focused on four main areas. The first is hydroponics, which involves the use of water-based systems for crop development, mainly medium- and long-term projects in vegetable production for human consumption. The second area is equestrian tourism, where we are working with a private developer who has secured an exceptional agreement with an international equestrian athletics team and plans to build a high-performance center in Portugal, focusing on the horse as an Olympic athlet, a project in which we will actively participate. The third area is livestock, where we aim to create one of the largest sheep herds based in Portugal, enabling value growth and monetization over time. Finally, we are also focused on permanent crops, representing more traditional agriculture, where we are working with several farmers and have already secured a multi-year agreement to develop intensive and super-intensive olive grove projects in the Ribatejo region, which we expect to generate attractive returns.

pitchScript.pt-BR: Foi por meio dessa capacidade de compreender os fundos de venture capital que desenvolvemos nossa atuação no setor de agronegócio, que se tornou um dos focos iniciais centrais do Growth Fund. Dentro desse fundo, construímos um conhecimento profundo que nos permitiu identificar quatro novas áreas de investimento em agronegócio que, na nossa visão, oferecem oportunidades relevantes de criação de valor. Como resultado, o fundo de agronegócio está concentrado em quatro áreas principais. A primeira é a agroponia, que envolve o uso de sistemas baseados em água para o desenvolvimento de culturas, principalmente projetos de médio e longo prazo voltados à produção de vegetais para consumo humano. A segunda área é o turismo equestre, na qual estamos trabalhando com um desenvolvedor privado que garantiu um acordo excepcional com uma equipe internacional de atletismo equestre e planeja construir em Portugal um centro de alto desempenho focado no cavalo como atleta olímpico, um projeto do qual participaremos ativamente. A terceira área é a pecuária, onde buscamos criar um dos maiores rebanhos de ovinos com base em Portugal, permitindo crescimento de valor e monetização ao longo do tempo. Por fim, também estamos focados em culturas permanentes, representando a agricultura mais tradicional, trabalhando com diversos agricultores e já tendo assegurado um acordo plurianual para desenvolver projetos de olivais intensivos e superintensivos na região do Ribatejo, que esperamos gerar retornos atrativos.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Agrobusiness Hydroponics 1

pitchScript.en-US: Going a bit deeper into each of these sectors, the first one is hydroponics. We have been developing a very interesting project in partnership with a non-governmental organization that supports children with certain disabilities in their personal development, while also promoting the cultivation of vegetables through hydroponic systems. As part of this initiative, we are creating a partnership with the University of Agronomy in Lisbon, where we see both the space and the interest to build a joint project involving the NGO, the Instituto Superior de Agronomia, and BlueCrow. The goal is to create a dedicated space for new agricultural technologies, which today essentially means hydroponic systems. We have already established several commercial relationships for the sale of the products grown in these new greenhouses, and we are now in the final stages of preparing the construction of the hydroponic greenhouses on the land that has been allocated to us.

The wool we harvest from our animals is being stored, with the expectation of better prices in the coming years. This process has been greatly facilitated by our partnership with OAA, another agricultural property managed by the fund, which has given us access to considerable land for this type of livestock operation.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Finance Fund Benefits
ALL_SLIDES.description: Explanation of the structural dependency on traditional energy grids and the increasing demand from individuals and businesses for decentralized and self-sufficient energy solutions.

pitchScript.en-US: So why the finance fund and what’s behind it? When we were analyzing the energy and renewable markets through our previous investments with the BlueCrow Growth Fund, we learned three key things. First, energy prices are extremely volatile and can be affected by even small geopolitical events, reductions in activity due to a global pandemic, or economic slowdowns. All of these factors impact energy prices, which are highly relevant not only for households but for many companies as well. With the BlueCrow Growth Fund, we were investing in project finance, which means financing the construction of renewable energy assets. By providing this type of financing, we can offer a fixed return to our investors while also stabilizing energy prices for our clients. This approach allows us to have the best of both worlds: clients benefit from low, predictable energy costs over a long period, and investors in the fund gain a strong investment opportunity with relatively high returns. This, of course, was the initial idea behind the fund.

With the BlueCrow Growth Fund, we were investing in project finance, which means financing the construction of renewable energy assets. By providing this type of financing, we can offer a fixed return to our investors while also stabilizing energy prices for our clients. This approach allows us to have the best of both worlds: clients benefit from low, predictable energy costs over a long period, and investors in the fund gain a strong investment opportunity with relatively high returns. This, of course, was the initial idea behind the fund.
pitchScript.pt-BR: Então por que o fundo financeiro e o que está por trás dele? Ao analisarmos os mercados de energia e renováveis por meio de nossos investimentos anteriores com o BlueCrow Growth Fund, aprendemos três coisas importantes. Primeiro, os preços da energia são extremamente voláteis e podem ser afetados por até pequenos eventos geopolíticos, reduções de atividade devido a uma pandemia global ou desacelerações econômicas. Todos esses fatores impactam os preços da energia, que são altamente relevantes não apenas para residências, mas também para muitas empresas. Com o BlueCrow Growth Fund, investíamos em project finance, ou seja, no financiamento da construção de ativos de energia renovável. Ao fornecer esse tipo de financiamento, podemos oferecer um retorno fixo aos nossos investidores e, ao mesmo tempo, estabilizar os preços de energia para nossos clientes. Essa abordagem nos permite ter o melhor dos dois mundos: os clientes se beneficiam de custos de energia baixos e previsíveis por um longo período, e os investidores do fundo têm uma oportunidade de investimento sólida com retornos relativamente altos. Esta, naturalmente, foi a ideia inicial por trás do fundo.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Finance Fund What Happens To My Money
ALL_SLIDES.description: Illustration of how invested capital in the finance fund is deployed, amortized, and reinvested over time, highlighting compounding effects and the reference investment amount for Golden Visa eligibility.

pitchScript.en-US: The investment process is very straightforward. Whenever an investor contributes money to the fund, we hold it until a suitable project is ready to be financed. As mentioned, the fund has four companies, each dedicated to a specific type of end client. We don’t invest per utility partner, but per client type. One SPV holds solar panels for residential clients, another for commercial clients, a third for industrial clients, what we call energy communities, and the fourth is the kinetic power plant. Each time a new project comes in, whether a household or company solar installation, we analyze it. If the project offers a return above 10% and fits within our portfolio range of 10–12%, we allocate funds to it. We hire a company to construct the setup, and from the return, 8% is paid annually to investors as a dividend. The remaining 2–4% covers fund fees or is reinvested in new projects.

One SPV holds solar panels for residential clients, another for commercial clients, a third for industrial clients, what we call energy communities, and the fourth is the kinetic power plant. Each time a new project comes in, whether a household or company solar installation, we analyze it. pitchScript.pt-BR: O processo de investimento é muito direto. Sempre que um investidor aporta dinheiro no fundo, mantemos os recursos até que um projeto adequado esteja pronto para ser financiado. Como mencionado, o fundo possui quatro empresas, cada uma dedicada a um tipo específico de cliente final. Não investimos por parceiro de utilidade, mas por tipo de cliente. Um SPV mantém os painéis solares para clientes residenciais, outro para clientes comerciais, um terceiro para clientes industriais, o que chamamos de comunidades de energia, e o quarto é a usina cinética. Cada vez que surge um novo projeto, seja uma instalação solar residencial ou empresarial, nós o analisamos. Se o projeto oferecer um retorno acima de 10% e se encaixar dentro da nossa faixa de portfólio de 10–12%, alocamos fundos nele. Contratamos uma empresa para construir a instalação e, do retorno, 8% é pago anualmente aos investidores como dividendo, enquanto os 2–4% restantes cobrem as taxas do fundo ou são reinvestidos em novos projetos.

pitchScript.en-US: If a company wants to build its own renewable energy facilities, it basically has two options. They can either buy it outright, using their own cash, or leverage financing to build the asset, which is outside of their usual operations. Alternatively, they can come to us and say, “I want part of my energy to come from renewable sources.” In that case, we cover the cost of the installation, and they simply pay for the energy the renewable asset generates. This setup has three major advantages compared to other options. First, it avoids bureaucracy. Second, the technology we use, mainly solar, is widely available and simple. Third, and most importantly, if one of our clients defaults, we’re working with a utility company, so the energy can be redirected to another client.

This is what we purchase. In fact, we are probably one of the largest buyers of solar panels in Portugal, but we don’t use the panels ourselves. Our utility company partners use them to sell energy to their clients, and this setup has allowed us to generate a very interesting and significant income stream.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Finance Fund Kinetic Power Plant
ALL_SLIDES.description: Introduction to kinetic energy principles and their application in kinetic power plants as an alternative renewable energy solution.

pitchScript.en-US: The other 2% of our renewable energy work, beyond the 98% focused on solar plus batteries, is dedicated to a kinetic power plant we decided to develop. A kinetic power plant combines a solar facility with a kinetic facility. The kinetic battery stores energy, which is then transformed into electricity through the movement of mechanical parts. In our setup, solar energy is captured through panels, stored in a battery, and then delivered continuously over 24 hours to an air pump. This air pump directs gusts of air whenever a bucket of water passes in front of it, causing the buckets to move within the mechanical machine, generating electricity. We are currently building a 1 MW factory for this project, co-invested with the Portuguese government. We cover 50% of the investment, and the government is our client for the energy produced by the machine. We are very pleased with this investment, even though it represents a very small portion of the fund.

pitchScript.en-US: With these two concepts in mind, we have raised close to €70 million for the fund so far, with a target of reaching €100 million. To achieve this, we created four portfolio companies where all the assets we finance and build are held, and these assets are then leased to a utility company that sells the energy to the end client. We are not involved in the operation of selling energy ourselves; our role is financing the construction of assets that will generate cash flow over time. The fund is set to liquidate by 2033, but it will be listed on Euronext, the European Union stock market, starting from 2027 onward.

O fundo está previsto para ser liquidado em 2033, mas será listado na Euronext, o mercado de ações da União Europeia, a partir de 2027.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Finance Fund Fund Summary Fees
ALL_SLIDES.description: High-level summary of the Finance fund’s current size, number of assets, fees, and positioning within BlueCrow’s investment platform.

pitchScript.en-US: Our strategy is very simple. The minimum investment in the fund is €100,000, making it accessible even for relatively small investors. We charge a set of fees based on the amount invested, plus an annual management fee for operating and managing the businesses within the fund. At the end, when all assets in the fund are sold, we reimburse the investor and take 20% of the fund’s capitalization, with the remaining 80% going to the investor.

Ao final, quando todos os ativos do fundo forem vendidos, reembolsamos o investidor e ficamos com 20% da capitalização do fundo, sendo os 80% restantes destinados ao investidor.

pitchScript.en-US: I’d now like to introduce the Portuguese Golden Visa program. This is a residence-by-investment framework designed for non-European Union citizens who wish to obtain residency in Portugal through a qualifying investment. We participate in this program through fully regulated investment funds, offering investors a structured and compliant pathway to residency while maintaining a clear investment focus.

pitchScript.pt-BR: Gostaria agora de apresentar o programa Golden Visa português. Trata-se de um esquema de residência por investimento, destinado a cidadãos que não pertencem à União Europeia e que desejam obter residência em Portugal através de um investimento qualificado. Participamos neste programa através de fundos de investimento totalmente regulamentados, oferecendo aos investidores um caminho estruturado e em conformidade para a residência, mantendo simultaneamente um foco claro em investimento.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Golden Visa Why Portugal
ALL_SLIDES.description: Explains why Portugal is an attractive country for residency and long-term investment, including lifestyle, stability, and economic factors.

pitchScript.en-US: Portugal consistently ranks as one of the most attractive countries in Europe to live and invest in. It offers political and economic stability, a high quality of life, a competitive cost of living compared to other major European cities, and a strong focus on innovation and technology. These factors make Portugal not only appealing from a lifestyle perspective, but also a solid and predictable environment for long-term investment.
pitchScript.en-UK: Portugal consistently ranks as one of the most attractive countries in Europe to live and invest in. It offers political and economic stability, a high quality of life, a competitive cost of living compared to other major European cities, and a strong focus on innovation and technology. These factors make Portugal not only appealing from a lifestyle perspective, but also a solid and predictable environment for long-term investment.
pitchScript.pt-BR: Portugal é amplamente reconhecido como um dos países mais atrativos da Europa para viver e investir. Oferece estabilidade política, elevada qualidade de vida, excelentes sistemas de saúde e educação e um custo de vida competitivo. Estes fatores tornam Portugal especialmente apelativo para famílias e planeamento de longo prazo.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Golden Visa Overview
ALL_SLIDES.description: Provides a high-level explanation of how the Golden Visa works, including eligibility, investment amount, and residency duration.

pitchScript.en-US: The Portuguese Golden Visa grants a residence permit to non-EU investors who make a qualifying investment of five hundred thousand euros. This permit is valid for five years and can include immediate family members. During this period, investors are required to meet only minimal stay requirements, while maintaining their investment and legal compliance.
pitchScript.en-UK: The Portuguese Golden Visa grants a residence permit to non-EU investors who make a qualifying investment of five hundred thousand euros. This permit is valid for five years and can include immediate family members. During this period, investors are required to meet only minimal stay requirements, while maintaining their investment and legal compliance.
pitchScript.pt-BR: O Golden Visa concede uma autorização de residência em Portugal mediante um investimento qualificado de quinhentos mil euros. A autorização é válida por cinco anos e pode incluir familiares diretos. Durante este período, os investidores apenas têm de cumprir requisitos mínimos de permanência, mantendo o investimento.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Golden Visa Benefits
ALL_SLIDES.description: Details the key benefits of the Golden Visa, including mobility, family reunification, access to services, and potential citizenship.

pitchScript.en-US: The Golden Visa offers a range of practical benefits. Investors gain visa-free travel within the Schengen Area, access to Portugal’s healthcare and education systems, and the ability to include close family members under the same application. After five years, investors may apply for Portuguese citizenship, subject to meeting the legal requirements, making this both a mobility and long-term planning solution.
pitchScript.en-UK: The Golden Visa offers a range of practical benefits. Investors gain visa-free travel within the Schengen Area, access to Portugal’s healthcare and education systems, and the ability to include close family members under the same application. After five years, investors may apply for Portuguese citizenship, subject to meeting the legal requirements, making this both a mobility and long-term planning solution.
pitchScript.pt-BR: O Golden Visa permite viajar sem visto no Espaço Schengen, aceder aos serviços públicos em Portugal e incluir familiares no processo. Após cinco anos, e cumpridos os requisitos legais, é possível solicitar a cidadania portuguesa, tornando esta solução atrativa para mobilidade e planeamento a longo prazo.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Golden Visa Step By Step
ALL_SLIDES.description: Explains the step-by-step Golden Visa application process from onboarding to residency approval.

pitchScript.en-US: The application process follows a clear sequence. It begins with obtaining a Portuguese tax number and preparing the necessary documentation. The qualifying investment is then made into an eligible fund, after which the Golden Visa application is submitted. Applicants attend a biometric appointment, and once approved, the residence permit is issued and renewed every two years throughout the five-year period.
pitchScript.en-UK: The application process follows a clear sequence. It begins with obtaining a Portuguese tax number and preparing the necessary documentation. The qualifying investment is then made into an eligible fund, after which the Golden Visa application is submitted. Applicants attend a biometric appointment, and once approved, the residence permit is issued and renewed every two years throughout the five-year period.
pitchScript.pt-BR: O processo começa com a obtenção do número de identificação fiscal português e a preparação da documentação necessária. O investimento é então realizado num fundo elegível, seguindo-se a submissão do pedido e a recolha de dados biométricos. A autorização é renovada a cada dois anos durante o período de cinco anos.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Golden Visa Simplified
ALL_SLIDES.description: Explains the simplified investment process that avoids the need for opening a traditional Portuguese bank account.

pitchScript.en-US: Another advantage of working with Blue Crow is that we can offer what we call a jumbo account, thanks to our financial licence. This makes the entire onboarding process much easier for you. If you choose to use our jumbo account, there’s no need to open a bank account with a local financial institution, everything can be handled directly through us. You simply send us the subscription documents and ask us to open a custody account for your shares. From there, you’ll get the same protection, security and transparency you’d expect from a traditional bank. It’s a smooth, efficient setup designed to make your investment experience simpler and more convenient.

Só precisa de nos enviar os documentos de subscrição e pedir a abertura de uma conta de custódia para as suas ações. A partir daí, garante o mesmo nível de proteção, segurança e transparência que teria num banco tradicional. É uma solução prática e eficiente, pensada para tornar a sua experiência de investimento mais simples e conveniente.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Golden Visa Investment Funds
ALL_SLIDES.description: Clarifies how investment funds qualify for the Golden Visa and the regulatory requirements they must meet.

pitchScript.en-US: For an investment fund to qualify under the Golden Visa framework, it must comply with strict regulatory criteria. At least sixty percent of the fund’s capital must be invested in Portuguese entities, and real estate investments are not permitted. Our funds fully meet these requirements, ensuring eligibility while maintaining a diversified and professionally managed investment strategy.
pitchScript.en-UK: For an investment fund to qualify under the Golden Visa framework, it must comply with strict regulatory criteria. At least sixty percent of the fund’s capital must be invested in Portuguese entities, and real estate investments are not permitted. Our funds fully meet these requirements, ensuring eligibility while maintaining a diversified and professionally managed investment strategy.
pitchScript.pt-BR: Para que um fundo de investimento seja elegível ao programa Golden Visa, deve cumprir critérios regulatórios rigorosos. Pelo menos sessenta por cento do capital do fundo deve ser investido em entidades portuguesas, e investimentos imobiliários não são permitidos. Os nossos fundos cumprem integralmente estes requisitos, garantindo a elegibilidade, ao mesmo tempo que mantêm uma estratégia de investimento diversificada e profissionalmente gerida.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Golden Visa Funds Offering
ALL_SLIDES.description: Presents BlueCrow’s Golden Visa–eligible fund offerings and their role within the residency-by-investment strategy.

pitchScript.en-US: BlueCrow offers a range of funds that are fully eligible under the Portuguese Golden Visa program. These funds are designed to combine regulatory compliance with a clear investment rationale, allowing investors to pursue residency without compromising on professional fund management, diversification, or long-term return potential.

pitchScript.en-US: I’d now like to shift focus to BlueCrow’s open-ended funds. These funds are designed for investors who value flexibility, liquidity, and a more conservative risk profile. Unlike closed-end funds, open-ended structures allow investors to enter and exit more easily, making them particularly suitable for those seeking steady returns and capital preservation rather than long-term capital lock-up.

Ao contrário dos fundos fechados, as estruturas abertas permitem que os investidores entrem e saiam com maior facilidade, tornando-os particularmente adequados para quem procura retornos estáveis e preservação de capital, em vez de um bloqueio de longo prazo do investimento.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Open Ended Fund Manager
ALL_SLIDES.description: Introduces Francisco Sousa Louro, the fund manager responsible for BlueCrow’s open-ended funds and highlights their experience and investment philosophy.

pitchScript.en-US: Open Ended fund is managed by Francisco Sousa Louro, a seasoned investment professional with more than sixteen years of experience in capital markets and asset management. His background spans equities, portfolio construction, multi-asset strategies, and private equity valuation. Francisco strongly believes in long-term investing driven by deep knowledge of companies rather than short-term market forecasting. Since joining BlueCrow in 2022, he has played a key role in embedding these principles into the fund’s investment approach.

A sua experiência abrange ações, construção de portfólios, estratégias multiativos e avaliação de private equity. Francisco acredita fortemente no investimento de longo prazo, baseado no conhecimento profundo das empresas, em vez de previsões de mercado de curto prazo. Desde que se juntou à BlueCrow em 2022, tem desempenhado um papel fundamental em incorporar estes princípios na abordagem de investimento do fundo.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Open Ended Funds Overview
ALL_SLIDES.description: Provides an overview of BlueCrow’s open-ended fund offering, including objectives, structure, and investor profile.

pitchScript.en-US: Let me dive into the open-ended funds. This fund is compose by two sub-fund's, combine them into a portfolio adapted to your risk profile and return expectations. The Portugal Short Term Fund is a pure fixed-income, debt-focused fund designed for conservative investors, with capital preservation as its main goal, offering weekly liquidity, allowing you to move money in and out, and it has an expected annual return of around 4%.. The Portugal Select Fund, on the other hand, is a pure equity fund for return-seeking investors, with an expected annual return of 8–10%. Investors should be prepared to stay invested for an extended period, essentially letting the capital grow over time. This fund is ideal for increasing your net worth in the long term, and we believe equities are the best vehicle to achieve that.

O Portugal Short Term Fund é um fundo de renda fixa pura, focado em dívida, destinado a investidores conservadores, com preservação de capital como objetivo principal, oferecendo liquidez semanal, permitindo movimentar o dinheiro facilmente, e com retorno anual esperado em torno de 4%. Já o Portugal Select Fund é um fundo de ações puro, voltado para investidores em busca de retorno, com retorno anual esperado de 8 a 10%. Os investidores devem estar preparados para se manter investidos por um período prolongado, permitindo que o capital cresça ao longo do tempo. Este fundo é ideal para aumentar seu patrimônio líquido a longo prazo, e acreditamos que ações são o melhor veículo para alcançar esse objetivo.

pitchScript.en-US: The Short-Term Fund is designed for investors who prioritise capital preservation and low volatility. It focuses on short-duration instruments that aim to deliver stable returns while minimising exposure to market fluctuations. This makes it an attractive option for investors looking to park capital efficiently without taking on unnecessary risk.
pitchScript.en-UK: The Short-Term Fund is designed for investors who prioritise capital preservation and low volatility. It focuses on short-duration instruments that aim to deliver stable returns while minimising exposure to market fluctuations. This makes it an attractive option for investors looking to park capital efficiently without taking on unnecessary risk.
pitchScript.pt-BR: O Fundo de Curto Prazo foi concebido para investidores com um perfil conservador. Foca-se em instrumentos de curta duração, procurando preservar o capital e gerar rendimentos estáveis e previsíveis, com exposição limitada à volatilidade dos mercados.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Short Term Fund Asset Allocation
ALL_SLIDES.description: Explains the asset allocation of the Short-Term Fund across bonds, trade finance, and deposits.

pitchScript.en-US: Looking more closely at the Portugal Short Term Fund, 60% of its capital is invested in Portuguese short-term corporate bonds, this is what makes the fund Golden Visa eligible. Another 20% is invested in a strategy we’ve been running since 2020 focused on global trade finance, which I’ll explain in more detail later. The remaining 20% goes into term deposits in European banks and a small portion in global short-term corporate bond funds. This part of the fund provides liquidity and flexibility. Currently, around 16% of the fund’s capital is held in deposits, serving as a stable safety anchor.
pitchScript.en-UK: Looking more closely at the Portugal Short Term Fund, 60% of its capital is invested in Portuguese short-term corporate bonds, this is what makes the fund Golden Visa eligible. The remaining 20% goes into term deposits in European banks and a small portion in global short-term corporate bond funds. This part of the fund provides liquidity and flexibility. Currently, around 16% of the fund’s capital is held in deposits, serving as a stable safety anchor.
pitchScript.pt-BR: Olhando mais de perto para o Portugal Short Term Fund, 60% do seu capital é investido em títulos corporativos portugueses de curto prazo, o que torna o fundo elegível para Golden Visa. Outros 20% estão investidos em uma estratégia que executamos desde 2020, focada em trade finance global, que explicarei com mais detalhes a seguir. Os 20% restantes são aplicados em depósitos a prazo em bancos europeus e uma pequena parcela em fundos globais de títulos corporativos de curto prazo. Essa parte do fundo proporciona liquidez e flexibilidade. Atualmente, cerca de 16% do capital do fundo está mantido em depósitos, servindo como um âncora de segurança estável.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Short Term Fund Bond Market
ALL_SLIDES.description: Provides context on the Portuguese short-term corporate bond market and its role within the fund.

pitchScript.en-US: The Portuguese bond market is a €76 billion market. While we could theoretically absorb more, we focus only on the short-term portion, a €30 billion segment of the market. By short-term, we mean bonds with a maximum maturity of seven years. Currently, the fund’s bond portfolio has an average maturity of 3.5 years. We have a pool of 46 different companies in which we can invest, with an average investment-grade rating. The average coupon on these bonds is 4.4%, which is why we expect the fund to deliver around the 4% annual return mentioned earlier.

Por curto prazo, entendemos títulos com prazo máximo de sete anos. Atualmente, a carteira de títulos do fundo tem maturidade média de 3,5 anos. Temos um pool de 46 empresas diferentes nas quais podemos investir, com rating médio de investment grade. O cupom médio desses títulos é de 4,4%, razão pela qual esperamos que o fundo entregue cerca de 4% de retorno anual, como mencionei anteriormente

ALL_SLIDES.title: Short Term Fund Trade Finance
ALL_SLIDES.description: Explains the role of trade finance investments in the Short-Term Fund and how they contribute to stability and diversification.

pitchScript.en-US: The global trade finance strategy is run by a dedicated team in Switzerland working 24/7 and has been operating successfully for years. In simple terms, it finances and hedges the risks involved in transporting commodities around the world. All loans are insured, providing stable returns, and despite no historical defaults, the short-term nature keeps volatility very low. Since 2020, this strategy has returned an average of 7%, giving the fund a higher-yield component that sets it apart from standard money market or government bond funds.
pitchScript.en-UK: The global trade finance strategy is run by a dedicated team in Switzerland working 24/7 and has been operating successfully for years. In simple terms, it finances and hedges the risks involved in transporting commodities around the world. All loans are insured, providing stable returns, and despite no historical defaults, the short-term nature keeps volatility very low. Since 2020, this strategy has returned an average of 7%, giving the fund a higher-yield component that sets it apart from standard money market or government bond funds.
pitchScript.pt-BR: A estratégia de trade finance global é gerida por uma equipe dedicada na Suíça, trabalhando 24 horas por dia, 7 dias por semana, e opera com sucesso há anos. Em termos simples, ela financia e protege contra riscos envolvidos no transporte de commodities ao redor do mundo. Todos os empréstimos são segurados, proporcionando retornos estáveis, e, apesar de não haver inadimplências históricas, a natureza de curto prazo mantém a volatilidade muito baixa. Desde 2020, essa estratégia tem apresentado um retorno médio de 7%, oferecendo ao fundo um componente de maior rendimento que o diferencia de fundos tradicionais de mercado monetário ou títulos públicos.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Short Term Fund Term Deposits
ALL_SLIDES.description: Describes the use of term deposits within the Short-Term Fund and their contribution to liquidity and yield.

pitchScript.en-US: Let’s talk about the anchor of this fund: deposits. A significant portion of the fund is always held in deposits, providing both liquidity and flexibility. This setup allows us to return capital to investors quickly if needed, whether for reinvestment or unexpected circumstances, all with minimal volatility. While this portion prioritizes safety over high returns, it still generates yields around 2–2.5%. Even in today’s low-interest environment, keeping a large part of the fund in deposits ensures stability and easy access to cash for our investors.
pitchScript.en-UK: Let’s talk about the anchor of this fund: deposits. A significant portion of the fund is always held in deposits, providing both liquidity and flexibility. This setup allows us to return capital to investors quickly if needed, whether for reinvestment or unexpected circumstances, all with minimal volatility. pitchScript.pt-BR: Vamos falar sobre a âncora deste fundo: os depósitos. Uma porção significativa do fundo é sempre mantida em depósitos, oferecendo liquidez e flexibilidade. Essa estrutura nos permite devolver capital aos investidores rapidamente, se necessário, seja para reinvestimento ou circunstâncias inesperadas, tudo com volatilidade mínima. Embora essa parte priorize a segurança em vez de altos retornos, ainda gera rendimentos em torno de 2 a 2,5%. Mesmo no atual cenário de juros baixos, manter uma grande parte do fundo em depósitos garante estabilidade e fácil acesso a recursos para nossos investidores.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Short Term Fund Track Record
ALL_SLIDES.description: Presents the historical performance and back-tested results of the Short-Term Fund, including risk and return characteristics.

pitchScript.en-US: The fund’s returns are reported net of all fees. Over the last five years, it has delivered around 13% annually, 9.7% over the past two years, and about 5% in the last 12 months. This track record underpins our target of a 4% expected annual return going forward.
pitchScript.en-UK: The fund’s returns are reported net of all fees. Over the last five years, it has delivered around 13% annually, 9.7% over the past two years, and about 5% in the last 12 months. This track record underpins our target of a 4% expected annual return going forward.
pitchScript.pt-BR: Os retornos do fundo são reportados líquidos de todas as taxas. Nos últimos cinco anos, ele apresentou um retorno de cerca de 13% ao ano, 9,7% nos últimos dois anos e aproximadamente 5% nos últimos 12 meses. Esse histórico de desempenho sustenta nossa meta de retorno anual esperado de 4% daqui para frente.

pitchScript.en-US: The Select Fund is designed for investors seeking higher return potential through exposure to equity markets. While it carries a higher risk profile than the Short-Term Fund, it remains guided by a disciplined and conservative investment philosophy. The objective is to generate long-term capital appreciation by investing in high-quality listed companies.
pitchScript.en-UK: The Select Fund is designed for investors seeking higher return potential through exposure to equity markets. While it carries a higher risk profile than the Short-Term Fund, it remains guided by a disciplined and conservative investment philosophy. The objective is to generate long-term capital appreciation by investing in high-quality listed companies.
pitchScript.pt-BR: O Select Fund foi concebido para investidores que procuram maior potencial de retorno através da exposição aos mercados acionistas. Apesar de apresentar um perfil de risco superior ao Fundo de Curto Prazo, segue uma abordagem disciplinada orientada para a valorização do capital no longo prazo.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Select Fund Asset Allocation
ALL_SLIDES.description: Explains the asset allocation of the Select Fund across Portuguese equities, global equities, and equity investment funds.

pitchScript.en-US: The Select Fund allocates 60% to Portuguese listed quality equities, which also makes it Golden Visa eligible. Another 20% is invested in a BlueCrow-managed global quality equity strategy that has returned 32–35% over the past three years. The remaining 20% goes into a Global Equities Investment Fund, providing additional diversification by investing in regions or markets where stock selection is less effective, such as emerging market equities, through carefully selected managers. This structure adds an extra layer of global diversification to the fund.
pitchScript.en-UK: The Select Fund allocates 60% to Portuguese listed quality equities, which also makes it Golden Visa eligible. The remaining 20% goes into a Global Equities Investment Fund, providing additional diversification by investing in regions or markets where stock selection is less effective, such as emerging market equities, through carefully selected managers. ALL_SLIDES.title: Select Fund Pt Equities Market
ALL_SLIDES.description: Provides context on the Portuguese equities market and its relevance within the Select Fund strategy.

pitchScript.en-US: Although the Portuguese stock market is relatively liquid, with a market size of €60 billion and major companies like EDP, Jerónimo Martins, and Galp, only about 20 companies are considered large and liquid enough for meaningful investment. To address this limited pool, the Select Fund incorporates global diversification, investing both in Portugal and internationally to broaden opportunities and reduce concentration risk.

Para lidar com esse pool limitado, o Select Fund incorpora diversificação global, investindo tanto em Portugal quanto internacionalmente, a fim de ampliar oportunidades e reduzir o risco de concentração.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Select Fund Gl Equities Market
ALL_SLIDES.description: Explains the role of global equities within the Select Fund and how they enhance diversification and growth potential.

pitchScript.en-US: When selecting companies to invest in, both globally and in Portugal, we are always looking for what we call “quality companies” with five key characteristics. First, they must have fortress-like balance sheets, using debt conservatively, and growth should be financed by their own cash flows. Second, they must be “cash machines,” generating very high returns on investment, high returns on equity, and strong margins on their products or services. Third, there must be a clear, modelable runway for future growth, if projected growth isn’t evident, the company isn’t considered. Fourth, founders or founding families should retain significant ownership, ensuring long-term management aligned with patient, long-horizon investors. Finally, they aim to avoid overpaying, seeking to buy at a discount compared to competitors or historical prices. Examples in the portfolio include Meta Platforms, Ferrari, Straumann, and Copart. These are the types of companies and time horizons the fund targets for long-term value creation.
pitchScript.en-UK: When selecting companies to invest in, both globally and in Portugal, we are always looking for what we call “quality companies” with five key characteristics. First, they must have fortress-like balance sheets, using debt conservatively, and growth should be financed by their own cash flows. Second, they must be “cash machines,” generating very high returns on investment, high returns on equity, and strong margins on their products or services. Third, there must be a clear, modelable runway for future growth, if projected growth isn’t evident, the company isn’t considered. Fourth, founders or founding families should retain significant ownership, ensuring long-term management aligned with patient, long-horizon investors. Finally, they aim to avoid overpaying, seeking to buy at a discount compared to competitors or historical prices. Examples in the portfolio include Meta Platforms, Ferrari, Straumann, and Copart. These are the types of companies and time horizons the fund targets for long-term value creation.
pitchScript.pt-BR: Ao selecionar empresas para investir, tanto globalmente como em Portugal, estamos sempre à procura do que chamamos de “empresas de qualidade”, com cinco características principais. Primeiro, devem ter balanços sólidos como fortaleza, utilizando a dívida de forma conservadora e financiando o crescimento com os seus próprios fluxos de caixa. Segundo, devem ser “máquinas de cash”, gerando altos retornos sobre o investimento, altos retornos sobre o capital próprio e margens fortes nos produtos ou serviços. Terceiro, deve existir uma projeção clara e modelável de crescimento futuro; se o crescimento projetado não for evidente, a empresa não é considerada. Quarto, os fundadores ou famílias fundadoras devem manter participação significativa, garantindo uma gestão de longo prazo alinhada com investidores pacientes e de horizonte alargado. Por fim, procura-se evitar pagar em excesso, adquirindo a empresa com desconto em relação à concorrência ou ao seu histórico de preços. Exemplos no portfólio incluem Meta Platforms, Ferrari, Straumann e Copart. Estes são os tipos de empresas e horizontes temporais que o fundo visa para a criação de valor a longo prazo.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Select Fund Global Funds
ALL_SLIDES.description: Describes the Select Fund’s use of global equity funds and ETFs as part of its investment process.

pitchScript.en-US: The final component of the fund involves selecting third-party funds and ETFs. Blue Crow has developed a disciplined process for this since their early days as investment advisors, creating a “circle of competence” to efficiently identify the best funds or ETFs for each geography or strategy. They maintain quarterly contact with fund managers and their teams, learning from the top international funds and applying these insights to their own strategies. The approach emphasizes simplicity and transparency, plain, easy-to-understand products designed to generate returns for investors, rather than trying to invent complex strategies.

ALL_SLIDES.title: Open Ended Factsheet B
ALL_SLIDES.description: Presents the factsheet for Share Class B and highlights how it differs from other share classes.

pitchScript.en-US: For the Portugal Short Term Fund, there is an annual management fee of 0.6% and no performance fee, as we believe it would be unfair to charge a performance fee on a low-yielding fund. Additionally, there is a subscription fee of 1.5%, which is deducted from your initial investment. For both funds, the minimum investment is €50,000, which is on the lower end compared to market standards. This structure is designed to encourage investors to build a portfolio of funds with us. The Portugal Select Fund has a management fee of 1.2% and a performance fee of 15%, applied only above a hurdle rate, which is calculated as the European Central Bank (ECB) interest rate plus 2.5%. For example, if the ECB rate was 2.5% last year, the performance fee would apply only to returns above 5%. This fund also carries a 1.5% subscription fee, and redemption fees are structured in a waterfall style.

pitchScript.pt-BR: Para o Portugal Short Term Fund, há uma taxa de administração anual de 0,6% e nenhuma taxa de performance, pois acreditamos que seria injusto cobrar uma taxa de performance em um fundo de baixo rendimento. Além disso, há uma taxa de subscrição de 1,5%, que é deduzida do investimento inicial. Para ambos os fundos, o investimento mínimo é de €50.000, valor relativamente baixo em comparação aos padrões de mercado. Essa estrutura foi projetada para incentivar os investidores a construir um portfólio de fundos conosco. O Portugal Select Fund tem uma taxa de administração de 1,2% e uma taxa de performance de 15%, aplicada apenas acima de uma taxa mínima (hurdle rate), que é calculada como a taxa do Banco Central Europeu (BCE) mais 2,5%. Por exemplo, se a taxa do BCE foi 2,5% no ano passado, a taxa de performance se aplicaria apenas a retornos acima de 5%. Este fundo também possui uma taxa de subscrição de 1,5%, e as taxas de resgate são estruturadas em estilo waterfall.

ALL_SLIDES.title: About Bluecrow Products Services
ALL_SLIDES.description: Summarises BlueCrow’s range of products and services offered to investors.

pitchScript.en-US: The company is divided into two main areas: venture capital and private equity, and asset management. Among the funds we manage, the four at the bottom labeled with Golden GV are the Golden Visa eligible funds. Today, BlueCrow offers the widest range of Golden Visa eligible funds in the market, spanning from venture capital to capital markets, including a short-term bond fund. This offering was intentional. We put ourselves in the investors’ shoes and recognized that a common concern on investing a significant amount of capital in a relatively unknown country. To address these concerns, we designed a broad suite of funds that allows investors to build their own diversified portfolio, tailored to their risk profile and return expectations, covering different asset classes and fund types.

ALL_SLIDES.title: About Bluecrow History
ALL_SLIDES.description: Explains BlueCrow’s evolution and growth since its establishment.

pitchScript.en-US: BlueCrow started as a pure investment advisor back in 2010 and in 2018, we launched our first Golden Visa eligible fund, the Blue Growth Fund, a private equity fund that is now closed for subscriptions. The first investors in this fund have already begun obtaining Portuguese passports. Building on the knowledge and experience gained from the BlueCrow Growth Fund, we launched the BlueCrow the Next Tech Fund in 2020. In 2025, we introduced the Portugal Short Term Fund and the Portugal Select Fund, two open-ended funds. Although these two funds are relatively new, the strategies behind them have been managed by us since the early days of BlueCrow.
